title: Fix MongoDB Projection to Handle Missing Fields

statement.markdown: A MongoDB collection contains documents with varying keys. Write a function to project the fields of these documents. The function should ignore any missing fields, but retain their original order.
statement.inputFormat: Each document is a JSON object with varying keys.
statement.outputFormat: The projected fields of the document.
statement.notes: The function should not raise any errors, even if a document does not have a specific field.

constraints.description: Number of documents in the collection

examples.explanation: The function should retain the original order of fields and ignore the missing field "city"
The function should ignore the missing field "age"
